title: What results can you expect after a regression session?
subtitle: Regression therapy helps achieve deep transformation and improve quality of life in various areas.

benefits.item1: Release from anxiety, fears and phobias
benefits.item2: Resolution of inner conflicts and contradictions
benefits.item5: Understanding the causes of recurring life patterns
benefits.item7: Discovery of new opportunities and perspectives
benefits.item10: Finding answers to important life questions

quote: Regression therapy is not just a journey into the past, it is a path to a better future through healing in the present.
